title: A Village Visit
article_text: My husband and I went to a small village last weekend. The village had no bus access, so we walked quickly. We saw a modern hospital there, and the treatment was very good. A doctor came to treat a man with a leg movement problem. He could not move his leg, but the doctor helped him identify the problem. The loss of movement made the man sad, but the treatment was worth the cost. The hospital had a good supply of natural medicine. My brother attended a meeting about the village's future. We must express our ideas, so shall we write a card? The pressure from the villagers was strong, but they felt happy because the agreement was good. You must take care of yourself!

image_prompts: A man and a woman walking hand in hand along a path to a small village with houses.
A dirt road leading to a village, with a sign showing no bus access, and two people walking quickly.
A modern hospital building with large windows, inside a doctor and a patient smiling.
A doctor in a white coat examining a man's leg in a hospital room.
A man sitting on a bed, touching his leg with a worried face, and a doctor pointing at a chart.
A man with a sad face looking at his leg, and a doctor holding a medicine bottle.
A hospital shelf with many bottles of natural medicine labeled 'herbs'.
A group of people sitting around a table in a meeting room, one man is a brother figure.
Two people sitting at a table with a card and a pen, talking and smiling.
A group of villagers talking to a doctor, with happy faces and a paper of agreement on the table.
